name: host-project boundary check
work_units: python files under src/ parsed for host-project references

name: Version consistency
covers: single source of truth for version in pyproject.toml
work_units: python files under src/ scanned for __version__ literals

name: Ruff lint
invariant: Python code conforms to Ruff lint rules

name: Mypy static type checking
covers: static type correctness across src/ and tests/
invariant: All Python code passes static type checking

name: Pytest test suite
covers: all functional and regression test assertions

name: Fleet board validation
covers: fleet board file integrity and consistency
invariant: Fleet board files are well-formed and consistent

name: Architecture boundary checker
covers: architecture layer isolation, circular imports, product-clean
invariant: Engine never imports gateway, no circular imports, product-clean
work_units: python files under src/ parsed for layer/import violations

name: Decision register linter
invariant: Decision register is monotonic, well-formed, and cross-references are valid

name: Review log staleness check
invariant: Review log rollup matches its source fragments

name: Gate registry self-validator
covers: gate registry consistency and coverage completeness
invariant: Every gate has a living enforcer and no two gates overlap

name: Security anti-pattern scanner
covers: bare excepts, secrets in source, hardcoded IPs, dangerous eval/exec/shell=True
invariant: No source file silently swallows exceptions, embeds secrets, hardcodes IPs, or uses eval/exec/subprocess-shell
work_units: python files under src/ AST-walked for anti-patterns

name: Test-pattern enforcement gate
covers: duplicate test names, missing docstrings, parametrize ratio, test function line count
invariant: All test files are free of duplicate names and encouraged toward parametrization and documentation

name: Unified CHARON GATE runner
covers: all validation checks in one command (ruff check, mypy, boundary, version, gate-registry)
invariant: Gate passes iff all sub-checks pass

name: CI workflow policy gate
covers: action-ref pin policy, fragile Windows smoke patterns, packaging-trigger path scoping
invariant: Every .github/workflows/*.yml conforms to the action-pin/Windows-smoke/path-trigger policy

name: Public-clean info-leak guard
covers: personal/internal tokens (internal IPs, home paths, rig/host names, hex secrets) in tracked files
invariant: No tracked file contains unallowlisted personal/internal info
work_units: git-tracked files scanned for personal/internal patterns

name: no-rig-import guard
covers: product hot path never imports the rig grader (benchmark/grader_daemon)
invariant: no src/charon/ module imports benchmark or grader_daemon (outside privileged-loop zones)
work_units: python files under src/ scanned for rig imports

name: Inert-code (dead/unwired symbol) detector
covers: 0-caller unreachable public symbols in src/charon (built but never wired in)
invariant: Every 0-caller public symbol in src/charon is either reachable, @inert_by_design, or tracked in tools/inert-code-disposition.json with a {reason, disposition} entry
work_units: python files under src/ walked for public symbols

name: Catalog case/quant mismatch detector
covers: catalog model ids are canonical (no case mismatches, no quantization suffix, no namespace prefix, no normalization collisions)
invariant: Every catalog entry has a canonical id; no two entries collide under normalization

name: Hardcoded cross-boundary path gate
covers: hardcoded absolute paths crossing unix-user, volume, fresh-install, or product-vs-rig boundaries
invariant: No tracked file contains an unallowlisted hardcoded absolute path that is unreachable across a portability boundary
